ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  "gini_index" TEXT /* Gini index of the region (measure of income inequality) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the assessment */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being assessed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "odb_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the country's digital readiness */,
  "odb_score" REAL /* Digital readiness score of the country */,
  "odb_score_change" INTEGER /* Change in digital readiness score from previous year */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assessment */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the assessment */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readiness" (
  "readiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readiness assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the readiness belongs to */,
  "readiness_score" REAL /* Digital readiness score of the country */,
  "implementation_score" REAL /* Implementation score of the country */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the country */,
  "strategic_plan_score" REAL /* Score for the country's strategic digital plan */,
  "infrastructure_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital infrastructure */,
  "cybersecurity_score" REAL /* Score for the country's cybersecurity measures */,
  "education_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital education */,
  "sustainability_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital sustainability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readiness_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy assessment */,
  "readiness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readiness assessment the policy belongs to */,
  "policies_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital readiness policies */,
  "action_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital readiness action */,
  "civil_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital readiness civil */,
  "business_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital readiness business */,
  "innovation_policy_score" REAL /* Score for the country's innovation policies */,
  "data_protection_score" REAL /* Score for the country's data protection policies */,
  "accessibility_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital accessibility */,
  "transparency_score" REAL /* Score for the country's transparency in digital policies */,
  "privacy_score" REAL /* Score for the country's privacy policies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_policies_readiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("readiness_id") REFERENCES readiness ("readiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "implementation_innovation" (
  "innovation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each innovation assessment */,
  "readiness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readiness assessment the innovation belongs to */,
  "innovation_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital implementation innovation */,
  "social_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital implementation social */,
  "accountability_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital implementation accountability */,
  "technology_adoption_score" REAL /* Score for the country's technology adoption */,
  "digital_literacy_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital literacy */,
  "innovation_ecosystem_score" REAL /* Score for the country's innovation ecosystem */,
  "digital_skills_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital skills */,
  "research_and_development_score" REAL /* Score for the country's research and development in digital technologies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("innovation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_implementation_innovation_readiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("readiness_id") REFERENCES readiness ("readiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact assessment */,
  "readiness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the readiness assessment the impact belongs to */,
  "political_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital impact on politics */,
  "social_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital impact on society */,
  "economic_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital impact on the economy */,
  "environmental_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital impact on the environment */,
  "healthcare_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital impact on healthcare */,
  "education_impact_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital impact on education */,
  "employment_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital impact on employment */,
  "public_services_score" REAL /* Score for the country's digital impact on public services */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_readiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("readiness_id") REFERENCES readiness ("readiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., digital readiness assessment, impact analysis) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map, dashboard) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
